name: Private Fairway Logan
about: Private Fairway Logan is an indoor golf simulator venue offering 24-hour access to private bays equipped with Trackman technology. The facility provides a professional environment for year-round golf practice, with an emphasis on privacy and unlimited play for members. Capped memberships ensure the space remains uncrowded, and pricing is structured around monthly or longer-term options with occasional promotions for punch passes. The venue is positioned as the best value in Cache Valley for serious golfers looking to improve their game in a dedicated, private setting.
why_golfers_like_it: Completely private bays with no neighboring groups or interruptions
Trackman technology for professional-grade swing analysis and data
400+ virtual courses including Pebble Beach and Pinehurst No. 2
24/7 access with unlimited play for members

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB policy allows outside food and drink

simulator_hardware.notes: Industry-leading radar technology used by professional golfers

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players must bring their own golf equipment as the venue does not provide club rentals.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, Private Fairway Logan operates on a BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) policy, allowing outside food and alcohol.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time varies based on simulator usage, but with unlimited play and private bays, members can play at their own pace without time restrictions.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue is designed for serious golf practice and doesn't specifically advertise kid-friendly amenities, though families can book private bays together.
